commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=d9d2b1b579028f7ea66687830ed7f6c99c3f1c61)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a Slack channel `ignoreOtherMentions` config key, a Slack inbound drop condition, and unit tests for user-mention cases.

PR surface: Source +23, Tests +102. Total +125 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review findings: source inspection shows the PR branch adds a runtime-only Slack key while the current strict Slack schema and public type omit it, and the new predicate checks `mentionedUserIds` but not `mentionedSubteamIds`. I did not run a live Slack repro because this was a read-only review and the PR has no real behavior proof.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR needs contributor real behavior proof and maintainer/product review for the new Slack config surface; ClawSweeper repair should not take over while the proof gate is missing.

target.title: feat(slack): add ignoreOtherMentions config option for channels
target.author: priyansh19

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
